title: VFP Simulation Job
description: A queued/running simulation job. The freshness guard reuses a done job with the same inputs_fingerprint instead of re-running.

inputs_fingerprint.description: Opaque digest of the design inputs (from the plugin's dirty-check). Identical fingerprints => the same sim result; the freshness guard reuses a prior done job.

saved_at.description: Cellview last-saved time (ddGetObjLastModify); flows to result provenance.saved_at.

session.description: Originating Virtuoso session_id (M8), bound at job.create; flows to result provenance.session.
